# Abstract Machines

> Open-source infrastructure company building secure, event-driven connectivity for IoT, edge computing, and distributed systems.

Abstract Machines was founded in 2017 and is headquartered in Paris, France. The company develops open-source software and RISC-V hardware for cloud-to-edge deployments, serving enterprises, research institutions, and innovators across Europe and beyond.

## Main Products

- **Magistrala** — Flagship open-source IoT platform. Multi-protocol device connectivity (MQTT, CoAP, HTTP, WebSocket), policy-based access control, time-series data, and multi-tenant architecture. https://magistrala.absmach.eu
- **Propeller** — WebAssembly orchestration and IoT rule engine for cloud, edge, and microcontroller targets. https://propeller.absmach.eu
- **FluxMQ** — Durable, low-latency MQTT broker for distributed event streams. https://fluxmq.absmach.eu
- **S0 Gateway** — Ultra-low-power RISC-V edge node (ESP32-S3, WiFi/BLE/Zigbee). https://hardware.absmach.eu
- **S1 Gateway** — Industrial-grade RISC-V gateway (dual-core, Ethernet/WiFi/LTE, −40°C to +85°C). https://hardware.absmach.eu
